hero.title: About DraveUp
hero.subtitle: Built by founders who were frustrated with overpriced, confusing domain registrars. We decided to build the one we always wanted.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To make establishing a professional online presence simple, affordable, and accessible for everyone — from first-time entrepreneurs to global enterprises.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: DraveUp was founded in 2026 by a team of engineers and entrepreneurs who were tired of navigating overpriced, confusing domain registrars that buried every product behind dark patterns and upsells.
story.p2: We built Drave from the ground up with a single commitment: transparent pricing, world-class technology, and genuine customer support. No tricks, no hidden fees, no auto-renewals you didn't agree to.
story.p3: Today, DraveUp manages millions of domains across 150+ countries, and we're just getting started.

v1.title: Transparency
v1.desc: No hidden fees, no surprise renewals. Every price is exactly what you'll pay — today and at renewal.

v2.title: Reliability
v2.desc: We operate redundant, enterprise-grade infrastructure with a financially backed 99.9% uptime SLA.

v3.title: Customer First
v3.desc: Our support team is staffed by real domain and hosting experts — available 24/7 in multiple languages.

v4.title: Innovation
v4.desc: We continuously invest in next-generation tools like our AI Website Builder to keep your business ahead.

team.title: Leadership Team
team.careers: We're hiring across engineering, support, and growth. See open roles.
